contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Warmup drafts: Amazon-restoration reel link + regenerate 19 pending drafts
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/94
  
  Details:
  Added the Amazon-restoration Instagram reel link (https://www.instagram.com/p/DJqW8TRtJK3/) to warm-up draft templates and regenerated all pending drafts so they ship with the new framing.
  
  What changed:
  
  go_to_market (PR #94):
  - scripts/suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py: new rule in grok_warmup_system_prompt (parallel to the existing /wholesale/ rule) requiring exactly one short mention of the Instagram reel as a 30-second visual proof — not a CTA. Static template body (warmup_body_template) gets a new paragraph immediately after the Amazon-restoration intro: "30-second proof of the restoration in motion: https://www.instagram.com/p/DJqW8TRtJK3/ — watch on your phone, see the actual tree planting and the satellite imagery the QR code unlocks for customers."
  - templates/warmup_outreach_reference.md: matching Dos bullet for consistency with the style guide.
  
  Operator-side cleanup (no PR; one-shot Python):
  - Deleted 17 pending Gmail drafts labeled AI/Warm-up via gsvc.users().drafts().delete (drafts only — sent emails untouched).
  - Re-ran scripts/suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py --use-grok. Reconcile flipped 20 rows pending_review → discarded; cadence allowed 19 fresh drafts (17 prior recipients + 2 new ones that hit the cadence window: Devine Wellness, Petal and Thorn Naturopathic).
  - Spot-checked Sugarpill Apothecary draft: body contains both instagram.com/p/DJqW8TRtJK3 AND agroverse.shop/wholesale, with the reel positioned right after the Amazon-restoration intro paragraph.
  
  Why:
  - The reel shows the tree-planting + satellite-imagery flow that the QR-traceability copy describes — pairing the two gives a recipient moved by the mission a 30-second visual proof before they decide whether to reply.
  - Position in the body matters: the reel is paired with the Amazon-restoration line (top of the body), the /wholesale/ link is paired with the PDF/photo attachments (middle of the body). Two distinct purposes, two distinct anchors.
  - Nothing was sent. The script's only side effect is creating Gmail drafts; sending stays operator-manual.
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/94
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 33.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
